intentSynonyms: search a to-do item in asana
search tasks in a workspace in asana
description: Search for tasks in a workspace. Supports filtering by text, assignee, completion status, due dates, and projects.

text.description: Text to search for in task names and descriptions

due_on_before.description: Filter tasks due on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

due_on_after.description: Filter tasks due on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

projects_any.description: Comma-separated project GIDs to filter by (matches any)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20, max 100)
